embeds.title: Head Executive
embeds.description: You are a **senior executive** responsible for bridging leadership and the administration team. You oversee major server initiatives, review complex cases, and shape server policy alongside the Co-Owner and Owner.

fields.name: 📋 Core Responsibilities
fields.value:
• Bridge communication between Owner/Co-Owner and Admins
• Oversee server-wide projects and initiatives
• Review complex moderation cases referred by Administrators
• Help shape server policy and rule updates
• Mentor Executives and Administrators
• Conduct periodic reviews of server health and staff performance

fields.name: 🔑 Admin Panel Access
fields.value:
Head Executives have access to the TSHE website admin panel. Use it to review site content, assist with maintenance toggles when directed by leadership, and review rule or guide updates.

**URL:** https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin
**Credentials:** Provided by Co-Owner or Owner.

fields.name: ⚡ Authority Overview
fields.value:
• Administrative permissions across most server channels
• Can issue temp bans up to 30 days independently
• Can issue permanent bans with Co-Owner sign-off
• Can manage Administrator-level staff and below
• Can escalate cases directly to Co-Owner or Owner

fields.name: 📤 Handle Directly
fields.value:
• Temp bans up to 30 days
• Inter-department disputes between Administrators
• Appeals from banned members (30 days or less)
• Staff performance concerns at Administrator level
• Conflicts that Head Admins have escalated

fields.name: 🚨 Escalate to Co-Owner / Owner
fields.value:
• Decisions that change server structure or rules broadly
• Staff misconduct reports against Administrators or Executives
• Permanent bans without clear consensus
• Any situation involving the founding team or leadership

fields.name: 📞 Escalation Chain
fields.value:
**Receives from:** Executives, Head Admins, Admins
**Escalates to:** Co-Owner → Owner

fields.name: 🌐 Key Links
fields.value:

📜 [Rules Page](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/rules) — Community rules
